title: cogsec on X: "The Shorthand Guide to Everything Claude Code" / X

sections.title: Introduction and Background
key_points: Author has 10 months of daily Claude Code usage experience
Won Anthropic x Forum Ventures hackathon using Claude Code
Built PMFProbe project for startup validation

sections.title: Skills and Commands System
key_points: Skills operate like rules for specific workflows and scopes
Commands are executable via slash commands (/refactor-clean, /tdd, /e2e)
Skills stored in ~/.claude/skills, commands in ~/.claude/commands
Can chain multiple commands together in single prompt
Codemap updater skill helps Claude navigate codebase without burning context

sections.title: Hooks System
key_points: Trigger-based automations for specific events
Hook types: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, Stop, PreCompact, Notification
Example: tmux reminder before long-running commands
Use hookify plugin to create hooks conversationally instead of manual JSON
Hooks constrained to tool calls and lifecycle events

sections.title: Subagents
key_points: Processes that main Claude can delegate tasks to with limited scopes
Can run in background or foreground, freeing up context
Examples: planner.md, architect.md, tdd-guide.md, code-reviewer.md
Can be sandboxed with specific tool permissions
Work well with skills for autonomous task execution

sections.title: Rules and Memory
key_points: Rules folder holds .md files with best practices Claude should always follow
Two approaches: single CLAUDE.md or modular rules folder
Examples: security.md, coding-style.md, testing.md, git-workflow.md
Rules include: no emojis in codebase, no purple hues in frontend, always test before deployment

sections.title: MCPs (Model Context Protocol)
key_points: Connect Claude to external services directly
Prompt-driven wrapper around APIs for more flexibility
Examples: Supabase MCP for SQL queries, Chrome MCP for browser control
Critical: context window management - be selective with enabled MCPs
Rule of thumb: 20-30 MCPs in config, keep under 10 enabled

sections.title: Plugins
key_points: Package tools for easy installation instead of manual setup
Can combine skills + MCP or bundle hooks/tools together
LSP plugins provide real-time type checking and intelligent completions
Install via plugin marketplace commands
Same context window warning applies as with MCPs

sections.title: Tips and Tricks
key_points: Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+U (delete line), ! (bash prefix), @ (search files), / (slash commands)
Parallel workflows: /fork for non-overlapping tasks, git worktrees for overlapping
tmux for long-running commands and log monitoring
mgrep > grep for better search capabilities
Useful commands: /rewind, /statusline, /checkpoints, /compact

sections.title: Editor Integration
key_points: Author prefers Zed editor for Claude Code workflow
Zed benefits: Agent Panel Integration, Rust performance, CMD+Shift+R command palette
VSCode/Cursor also viable with terminal format or extension
Split screen setup: terminal with Claude Code + editor
Enable auto-save, git integration, and file watchers

sections.title: Author's Complete Setup
key_points: 14 plugins installed but only 4-5 enabled at a time
14 MCPs configured but only 5-6 enabled per project
Custom hooks for tmux reminders, formatting, TypeScript checks
Structured rules and subagents for different concerns
Custom status line showing user, directory, git branch, context %, model, time, todos

summary.title: Complete Guide to Advanced Claude Code Setup and Optimization
takeaways: Context window management is critical - be selective with enabled MCPs and plugins
Skills, hooks, and subagents create powerful automation workflows
Parallel execution through forking and git worktrees improves productivity
Editor integration enhances the Claude Code experience significantly
Structured configuration with rules, agents, and hooks enables sophisticated AI-assisted development
actionable: Set up modular rules structure in ~/.claude/rules/
Create custom skills for repetitive workflows
Implement hooks for automatic formatting and validation
Configure subagents with limited tool permissions
Enable only essential MCPs per project to preserve context
Use tmux for long-running command monitoring
Set up parallel workflows with /fork and git worktrees
Integrate with preferred editor for real-time file tracking

sections.title: 介绍和背景
key_points: 作者拥有10个月的Claude Code日常使用经验
使用Claude Code赢得了Anthropic x Forum Ventures黑客马拉松
构建了PMFProbe项目用于初创公司验证

sections.title: 技能和命令系统
key_points: 技能像特定工作流程和范围的规则一样运作
命令可通过斜杠命令执行（/refactor-clean, /tdd, /e2e）
技能存储在~/.claude/skills，命令存储在~/.claude/commands
可以在单个提示中链接多个命令
代码映射更新器技能帮助Claude导航代码库而不消耗上下文

sections.title: 钩子系统
key_points: 针对特定事件的基于触发器的自动化
钩子类型：PreToolUse、PostToolUse、UserPromptSubmit、Stop、PreCompact、Notification
示例：长时间运行命令前的tmux提醒
使用hookify插件通过对话创建钩子，而不是手动JSON
钩子限制在工具调用和生命周期事件

sections.title: 子代理
key_points: 主Claude可以委托任务给具有有限范围的进程
可以在后台或前台运行，释放上下文
示例：planner.md、architect.md、tdd-guide.md、code-reviewer.md
可以用特定工具权限进行沙盒化
与技能配合良好，实现自主任务执行

sections.title: 规则和记忆
key_points: 规则文件夹包含Claude应始终遵循的最佳实践.md文件
两种方法：单个CLAUDE.md或模块化规则文件夹
示例：security.md、coding-style.md、testing.md、git-workflow.md
规则包括：代码库中不使用表情符号、前端不使用紫色色调、部署前始终测试

sections.title: MCP（模型上下文协议）
key_points: 直接将Claude连接到外部服务
围绕API的提示驱动包装器，提供更多灵活性
示例：用于SQL查询的Supabase MCP、用于浏览器控制的Chrome MCP
关键：上下文窗口管理 - 选择性启用MCP
经验法则：配置中20-30个MCP，保持启用少于10个

sections.title: 插件
key_points: 打包工具以便于安装，而不是手动设置
可以组合技能 + MCP或捆绑钩子/工具
LSP插件提供实时类型检查和智能补全
通过插件市场命令安装
与MCP相同的上下文窗口警告适用

sections.title: 技巧和窍门
key_points: 键盘快捷键：Ctrl+U（删除行）、!（bash前缀）、@（搜索文件）、/（斜杠命令）
并行工作流：/fork用于非重叠任务，git worktrees用于重叠任务
tmux用于长时间运行的命令和日志监控
mgrep > grep提供更好的搜索能力
有用的命令：/rewind、/statusline、/checkpoints、/compact

sections.title: 编辑器集成
key_points: 作者偏好Zed编辑器用于Claude Code工作流
Zed优势：Agent Panel集成、Rust性能、CMD+Shift+R命令面板
VSCode/Cursor也可行，使用终端格式或扩展
分屏设置：带Claude Code的终端 + 编辑器
启用自动保存、git集成和文件监视器

sections.title: 作者的完整设置
key_points: 安装了14个插件，但一次只启用4-5个
配置了14个MCP，但每个项目只启用5-6个
用于tmux提醒、格式化、TypeScript检查的自定义钩子
针对不同关注点的结构化规则和子代理
显示用户、目录、git分支、上下文%、模型、时间、待办事项的自定义状态行

summary.title: 高级Claude Code设置和优化完整指南
takeaways: 上下文窗口管理至关重要 - 选择性启用MCP和插件
技能、钩子和子代理创建强大的自动化工作流
通过分叉和git worktrees的并行执行提高生产力
编辑器集成显著增强Claude Code体验
带有规则、代理和钩子的结构化配置实现复杂的AI辅助开发
concepts: 基于钩子的自动化系统
子代理委托和范围限定
actionable: 在~/.claude/rules/中设置模块化规则结构
为重复性工作流创建自定义技能
实现用于自动格式化和验证的钩子
配置具有有限工具权限的子代理
每个项目只启用必要的MCP以保留上下文
使用tmux进行长时间运行的命令监控
使用/fork和git worktrees设置并行工作流
与首选编辑器集成以实现实时文件跟踪
